memory_cards.statement: User wants to research the relationship (rapporto) between language and human intelligence.

details: Stored the user’s research intent as a durable goal/topic.

repair_options: Clarify which language aspects to study (e.g., syntax, semantics, bilingualism) and what intelligence measure/framework to use (e.g., g-factor, IQ, cognitive development).
